seo.meta_title: Mount Rinjani Tour Packages — Treks, Summit & Lake | Go2Rinjani
seo.meta_description: Explore Mount Rinjani tour packages with Go2Rinjani — crater rim treks, summit climbs, Segara Anak lake descents, and Sembalun route expeditions. All levels welcome.

hero.title: Mount Rinjani Tour Packages for Every Type of Trekker
hero.desc: Go2Rinjani offers guided Mount Rinjani tour packages for all experience levels — from the open savannahs of Sembalun to the sacred shores of Segara Anak lake. Every trek includes certified local guides, porters, permits, and full camp support.

packages.title: Mount Rinjani Treks
packages.desc: Choose from six guided Mount Rinjani trek packages across two iconic routes — Sembalun and Senaru. From 2-day summit climbs to 4-day full expeditions with crater rim, hot springs, and Segara Anak lake. All itineraries include certified local guides, porters, permits, meals, and full camp support.

stampol_callout.section_title: Rinjani Fully Booked or Closed on Your Dates?
stampol_callout.title: Mount Stampol Trek — Your Best Alternative in Lombok
stampol_callout.desc: When Mount Rinjani is closed for the season or fully booked on your dates, Mount Stampol offers a stunning 2-day crater rim trek on the outer slopes of Rinjani National Park — quieter trails, lush rainforest, and panoramic views of Rinjani's caldera and Segara Anak lake.
